title: geranium sibbaldioides var. elongatum
intro: Geranium sibbaldioides var. elongatum, also known as Geranium elongatum or Elongated Crane's-bill, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. It is used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, wounds, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Geranium sibbaldioides var. elongatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and support overall health.
